alkylation reagent: samples were subjected to mass analysis using a Thermo Scientific Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano ultra-high performance liquid chromatography (UPLC) system coupled to a high-resolution Thermo Scientific Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
instrument: high-resolution Thermo Scientific Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
labeling: Peptides were identified and quantified by label-free quantification using MaxQuant
